overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval castle common room featuring an ornate stone fireplace with a burning fire. A translucent ghostly figure appears on the left side and drifts around the room while the camera maintains a mostly stationary position with slight panning movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with large fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the fireplace and room interior

entered.detail: large arched stone fireplace with intricate carvings and burning fire inside
bright orange flames burning within the fireplace grate
polished stone tile flooring with circular pattern near fireplace
tall green plant in pot near the left wall
stone archway leading to adjacent room on the left side
ornate wooden carved beams framing the fireplace top

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a static view of a medieval castle common room centered on an ornate stone fireplace with a bright burning fire. The room features polished stone floors, wooden architectural details, and a potted plant visible in the left background. No characters are present in the initial moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with ghostly apparition

events.description: translucent ghostly figure fades into view near the left archway
ghost briefly fades out of visibility then reappears
ghost moves from left-mid position toward left-far archway

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary observation while watching the ghostly figure drift around the left side of the room

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure floating and drifting around the left side near the archway, periodically fading in and out of visibility

segments.scene_description: A translucent ghostly NPC appears on the left side near the stone archway and begins drifting around the room. The ghost periodically fades in and out of visibility while maintaining a floating presence near the left wall. The fireplace continues burning brightly in the center of the frame throughout the segment.

events.description: ghostly figure fades out completely and disappears from view

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the now empty room

segments.scene_description: The ghostly figure fades out completely, leaving the room empty once again. The camera remains focused on the burning fireplace as the video concludes with the same static view of the castle interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene medieval common room that is briefly interrupted by a supernatural presence before returning to its original stillness. It begins with a static view of the interior, centered on a bright fire burning within an ornate stone fireplace amidst polished floors and wooden architectural details. As the camera maintains its position, a translucent ghostly figure emerges from a stone archway on the left and drifts through the room, periodically fading in and out of visibility. The scene then shifts back to a state of solitude as the spirit completely vanishes from sight. Finally, the camera lingers on the glowing hearth, leaving the room empty and silent once more.
